paper.title: Aligning language models to follow instructions
paper.abstract: We’ve trained language models that are much better at following user intentions than GPT-3 while also making them more truthful and less toxic, using techniques developed through our alignment research. These InstructGPT models, which are trained with humans in the loop, are now deployed as the default language models on our API.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
